common.unsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to close?

games.title: Games
games.subtitle: Create, edit, duplicate and delete the gamification engine's games.
games.empty: No games yet. Create the first one.

form.externalGameIdHelp: Unique identifier in your system (alphanumeric slug).
form.externalGameIdInvalid: Use 3 to 60 characters: letters, numbers, hyphen (-) or underscore (_).
form.paramsEditNote: When editing, only existing parameter values are saved; adding new ones isn't available here yet.

delete.title: Delete this game?
delete.blastRadius_one: It will also delete {{count}} task and its associated data.
delete.blastRadius_other: It will also delete {{count}} tasks and their associated data.

duplicate.title: Duplicate game
duplicate.message: A deep copy of “{{externalGameId}}” will be created with all its tasks and parameters.
duplicate.label: New game external ID

form.strategyHelp: If left empty, it inherits the game's strategy.

delete.title: Delete this task?
delete.message: This will permanently delete “{{externalTaskId}}” and its associated data.

duplicate.title: Duplicate task
duplicate.message: A copy of “{{externalTaskId}}” will be created with its strategy and parameters.
duplicate.label: New task external ID

revoke.title: Revoke this API key?
revoke.message: Revocation is irreversible. Integrations using “{{prefix}}” will stop working immediately.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Look up a user's points and wallet balance by external ID.
users.empty: Enter an external ID to see its points and balance.
